steps.title: Identify the triangle type
steps.content:
The figure shows a right triangle with a $30^\circ$ angle, so the other acute angle is
$$
180^\circ-90^\circ-30^\circ=60^\circ
$$
This is a $30$-$60$-$90$ triangle.

steps.title: Set up the tangent ratio
steps.content:
For angle $A$, tangent is opposite over adjacent. The opposite side is the longer leg and the adjacent side is the shorter leg, so
$$
\tan A=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{1}=\sqrt{3}
$$

steps.title: Convert the radical
steps.content: As a decimal, $$ \sqrt{3}\sim1.732 $$ The answer is 1.732.
